## Summary

Describe what changed, why it changed, and the user or maintainer impact.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Enhancement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Maintenance
- [ ] Release preparation

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] Lint passes
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] No unrelated changes
- [ ] Behaviour verified

## Testing

List the automated commands and manual checks performed. Clearly identify checks that remain outstanding.

## Screenshots (if UI)

Add before-and-after screenshots for visible interface changes. Remove manuscript prose, vault paths, and other private information.

## Documentation Updated

List the documentation changed, or explain why no documentation update is required.

## Breaking Changes

Describe any compatibility or migration impact. Write `None` when there are no breaking changes.
